synopsis.value:
Kim Baek-Du (Jang Dong-Yoon) participates in the traditional Korean wrestling sport of ssireum and is a member of the ssireum team for the Geosan County Office. Kim Baek-Du was born as the youngest son of a prestigious ssireum family. In his past, he was known as a genius like ssireum wrestler, but not anymore. He is thinking about retiring from the sport altogether. One day, Kim Baek-Du meets his childhood friend Oh Yu-Gyeong (Lee Joo-Myoung) and has a turning point in his ssireum life. Oh Yu-Gyeong and Kim Baek-Du grew up together in Geosan County. She begins to work as a leader of the management team for the ssireum team, which is on the verge of disbanding.

Meanwhile they have people around them like Min Hyun-Wook (Yun Jong-Seok), who suddenly appears at Geosan County and adjusts well to life here, and Joo Mi-Ran (Kim Bo-Ra) who is a mysterious cafe owner. There's also the new coach Kwak Jin-Su (Lee Jae-Joon) of the ssireum team and Cho Seok-Hui (Lee Joo-Seung), who is Kim Baek-Du’s best friend and works as a police constable.
